prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约3904→3626→3398→22842→2618名。2021–2023年呈逐年小幅前移趋势（3904→3398），2024年因专业组结构调整出现异常值（22842），2025年已恢复至2618名，近两年基准位次稳定在2600–3400区间；该校在江苏物理类招生计划：2021年80人→2022年91人→2023年79人→2024年64人→2025年58人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划75人，较2025年增加17人（扩招约29%），扩招幅度较大，理论上缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京理工大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第19→2022年第18→2023年第16→2024年第14→2025年第13→2026年第14名，稳居全国Top20顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及宫琳师德失范事件等，学校处理较为迅速；抖音热度排名第47（较热），综合热度83.8万，短视频曝光中等偏上；近年无显著投档断档记录，整体声誉对报考影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，A-及以上学科达12个：信息与通信工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A、材料科学与工程A、光学工程A、管理科学与工程A、力学A-、化学工程与技术A-、工商管理A-、数学A-、物理学A-，学科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业为高热推荐，与北理工优势学科方向一致，社会热度持续升温；江苏省2026年物理类考生约37.9万人（按历史比例估算），较2025年26.1万人增长约45%，竞争显著加剧；省控线（物理类本科批）从2021年417分逐年升至2025年463分，反映整体竞争趋紧；北京理工大学位于北京，对江苏考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在江苏招生占比约21.7%（2025年），为省外主要生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2618名、2026年扩招约29%（缓解竞争）、江苏物理类考生大幅增长约45%（加剧竞争）、学校层次顶尖且声誉稳定、优势学科热度高等因素，扩招效应与考生增长效应部分抵消。预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约3028名，区间2683–3373名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3904 → 3626 → 3398 → 22842 → 2618. From 2021 to 2023, there was a gradual slight upward trend (3904 → 3398). In 2024, an anomaly occurred (22842) due to adjustments in major group structure. In 2025, it recovered to 2618, with the baseline ranking stabilizing in the 2600–3400 range in recent two years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu: 80 in 2021 → 91 in 2022 → 79 in 2023 → 64 in 2024 → 58 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 75, an increase of 17 (about 29% expansion) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, theoretically alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been rising in recent years: 19th in 2021 → 18th in 2022 → 16th in 2023 → 14th in 2024 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026, firmly in the top 20 elite universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the Gong Lin teacher ethics misconduct incident, but the university handled it relatively quickly. Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of 838,000, and short video exposure is moderately high. There have been no significant admission cutoff gaps in recent years, and overall reputation has limited impact on applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has 12 disciplines rated A- or above: Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Mechanics A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Business Administration A-, Mathematics A-, Physics A-, with top-tier discipline strength highly matching the admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended, aligning with BIT's advantageous disciplines, with continuously rising social popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu is approximately 379,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), an increase of about 45% compared to 261,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has risen from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, reflecting overall tightening competition. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Jiangsu candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 21.7% (2025), making it one of the main out-of-province source regions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2618, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 29% (alleviating competition), the significant increase of about 45% in Jiangsu Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), the top-tier university level with stable reputation, and high popularity of advantageous disciplines, the expansion effect and candidate growth effect partially offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 3028, with a range of 2683–3373.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2683–3373, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Excellence Class/Future Precision Engineering/Xu Teli Talent Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2683), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top classes; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 3373), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1337名、招生计划持平、江苏历史类考生大幅增长约46%（竞争加剧）、学校层次高但文科专业少且热度一般等因素，预计2026年历史类最低录取位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约1367名，区间1211–1523名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1300 → 1407 → 1340 → 1337, stable within the 1300–1410 range over four years, with minimal fluctuation (range only 107). The 2025 baseline is about 1337. Enrollment plans in Jiangsu for History Category: 2022: 12 → 2023: 12 → 2024: 26 → 2025: 26 → 2026: 26, stable at 26 in recent three years, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked among the top 14–19 nationally by Soft Science. Although strong in science and engineering, its 985 status still attracts liberal arts candidates. In 2026, reputation is slightly negative (due to the Gong Lin incident, etc.), but mainly in science and engineering fields, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions. Douyin popularity is relatively high, with moderate overall exposure. Disciplines such as Business Administration (A-) and Management Science and Engineering (A) are somewhat related to liberal arts majors (Social Science Experimental Class), but BIT's overall strength in liberal arts is weaker than in science and engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Experimental Class (including Law + Artificial Intelligence dual degree, Economics, Business Administration, etc.) has mixed social popularity and is under observation. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu is about 142,000 (estimated based on historical proportion), an increase of about 46% from 97,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) rose from 471 in 2022 to 482 in 2025, increasing year by year. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, offering some regional appeal to Jiangsu liberal arts candidates. The university has a relatively high overall enrollment share in Jiangsu (about 21.7%), but only 26 liberal arts slots, limited in number.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1337, stable enrollment plans, a significant 46% increase in Jiangsu History Category candidates (intensified competition), high university level but few liberal arts majors and moderate popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decline. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 1367, with a range of 1211–1523.
